reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All three gates passed (Gate 1: public API in library crate; Gate 2: consensus-critical computation affecting all validators, not restricted to trusted data source; Gate 3: in scope for Fusaka/EIP-7918). The finding identifies a specification deviation where next_block_excess_blob_gas_osaka() receives the child block's base_fee_per_gas instead of the parent's, inconsistent with using parent's excess_blob_gas and blob_gas_used. This could cause consensus splits if EIP-7918's blob gas calculation depends on base fee, but exploitability depends on EIP-7918's internal design details. Severity remains High due to potential network-wide consensus impact.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: EIP-7918: Blob base fee bounded by execution cost; Base fee computation must use parent block gas values (SG-015)
